changes.description: New Customer Module: Dedicated customer management built on the redesigned data model
New Supplier Module: Improved supplier records with the new database architecture
New Payments Module: Centralized payment tracking independent of invoices
Automatic Data Migration: Existing v3.6 databases are migrated to the new v4 schema during upgrade
Complete TypeScript migration across Electron, backend, routes, utilities, middleware, and frontend scripts for improved reliability and maintainability
Database Architecture Redesign: Modernized MongoDB schemas for better scalability and future feature development
Service Layer Architecture: Business logic moved into dedicated services for cleaner, more maintainable code
Build System Modernization: New TypeScript build pipeline, improved development workflow, and optimized project structure
Developer Infrastructure: Added automated testing with Vitest and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
Improved overall application stability through stricter type checking and extensive internal refactoring
